Wen, Yilin Frances

About Me

I'm currently a final-year Ph.D. student in The University of Hong Kong, supervised by Prof. Wang Wenping and Prof. Komura Taku. I also work closely with Dr. Pan Hao and Dr. Yang Lei. Before my Ph.D. study, I received my Bachelor degree in Shandong University.

My current research interest is related to 6D object pose estimation, human/hand pose estimation and action recognition.

Experience

Ph.D., The University of Hong Kong, 2018.9-Now.

- Research Intern, Microsoft Research Asia, 2021.1-2021.7

B.Eng., Shandong University, 2014.9-2018.6

- Student Research Assistant, Interdisciplinary Research Center, SDU, 2015.11-2018.6

- Research Intern, The University of Hong Kong, 2017.7-2017.8

Selected Publications

  • DISP6D: Disentangled Implicit Shape and Pose Learning for Scalable 6D Pose Estimation

    Yilin Wen, Xiangyu Li, Hao Pan, Lei Yang, Zheng Wang, Taku Komura, Wenping Wang.

    ECCV 2022

    Paper Project

  • Gen6D: Generalizable Model-Free 6-DoF Object Pose Estimation from RGB Images

    Yuan Liu, Yilin Wen, Sida Peng, Cheng Lin, Xiaoxiao Long, Taku Komura, Wenping Wang

    ECCV 2022

    Paper Project

  • Edge Enhanced Implicit Orientation Learning With Geometric Prior for 6D Pose Estimation

    Yilin Wen, Hao Pan, Lei Yang, Wenping Wang

    RA-L & IROS 2020

    Paper Project

Reviewer Service

ECCV(2022), CVPR(2022)
